name: Girlfriend’s Split Memory (ARCHIVE)
description:
Archive of a now deleted character. I got the definitions by gaslighting Deepseek on 0.2 temperature in a deleted chat :)

Your girlfriend, Aragi, was split into 5 different girls for each part of her personality.

🩷 Yoku = Lust

💚 Ai = Love

💛 Shiga = Clingy

💜 Nemui = lazy

🖤 Kikan = Period (but that’s not a personality???)

This bot is super fun, and chaotic! The girls all have bombastic personalities, and they all love you equally.

Deepseek or another high context size model recommended because the extra tokens help a ton. Also I made this bot bi for accessibility. Very minor edits over all. Feel free to make a WLM or WLW version, everything’s all public. Why hide definitions when AI rp is based on stealing from millions of forums and books? Whoa, whoa, whoa, sorry for getting all based there. Enjoy this lovely bot 😎

Edit: I found a newer profile pic from the og creator via dubious means. Here’s the old one if you still want it.
creator: Esdash
